Fake CBN Grants

Phishing

Social

Verification code requests from known contacts to hijack your account.

SMS Fraud

SMS alerts claiming your bank account is suspended. Do not click links.

Safety Wisdom

Protect Your PIN

Never share your bank OTP with anyone, even if they claim to be from your bank.

Check the Link

Always verify the domain. Official banks use .com or .ng, not random characters.
